title: Summarize Academic Paper
description: Provide a concise summary of a research paper.
prompt:
Summarize the following paper in 200 words:
{{content}}

title: Create Study Plan
description: Generate a weekly study plan for a given subject.
prompt: Create a 4‑week study plan for {{subject}} covering these topics: {{topics}}.

title: Business Pitch
description: Draft a short pitch for a startup idea.
prompt: Write a 2‑minute pitch for a startup that solves {{problem}} using {{solution}}.
